computed_from: Initial defaults from Zak weekly-report benchmarks; refine once 8+ weeks of daily data available. Split targets (cogs_food/cogs_bev/wages_kitchen/wages_foh) are DRAFT — Zak to confirm.

cogs.note: Blended food+bev COGS; bar-heavy Stow typically lands ~28-30% — refine after 8 weeks of daily data

wages.note: Zak-set 30% target — hospitality benchmark; splits kitchen + FOH

cogs_food.note: DRAFT — Zak to confirm. Food COGS vs food revenue (ex-GST). Weekly-report placeholder food GP is 65% (i.e. 35% COGS); target set slightly tighter.

cogs_bev.note: DRAFT — Zak to confirm. Bev COGS vs bev revenue (ex-GST). Drinks GP at Stow runs ~80% on cocktails (known-margins.md); blended bev incl. beer/wine lands lower.

wages_kitchen.note: DRAFT — Zak to confirm. Kitchen wages as % of FOOD revenue (ex-GST), not total.

wages_foh.note: DRAFT — Zak to confirm. FOH wages as % of BEV revenue (ex-GST), not total.

gp.note: Higher is better — 70% target; status inversion not yet implemented so alerts left empty

seasonal_factors.note: Placeholder — will be populated once 6+ months of Stow daily data available.

day_of_week_weights.note: Placeholder — will use Stow sales-lookup data to compute typical Mon-Sun revenue pattern.
